design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.general_idea: Removed unused imports for ArrayList and List to clean up the source file.
Changed TV instance retrieval from a method call to a static field access, implying a refactor in the TV class.
Changed field types from concrete command classes to the Command interface to adhere to programming to an interface.
Added an explicit cast to NavigateChannelCommand to access the specific setChannel method not present in the Command interface.
Refactor the class-based singleton implementation to use the enum-based singleton pattern for better serialization and reflection safety.
design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.human_impl: Replaced `public final class TV` with `public enum TV` and `private static final TV instance` with `INSTANCE;`.

design_patterns/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler plugin configuration to target Java 21 instead of Java 8.

.gitignore.general_idea: Added patterns to ignore Eclipse-specific project metadata and configuration files.
Added pattern to ignore JVM crash heap dump files generated by the Java process.
